Trimmed ADM fixtures for the advanced showcase parser tests.

Sources:
- `advanced-combat-from-9724824-log-1.ADM` was trimmed from `C:\Users\rafae\Downloads\9724824-log (1).ADM`.
- `advanced-build-from-17428528-logs.ADM` was trimmed from `C:\Users\rafae\Downloads\17428528-log (1).ADM`, `(10).ADM`, `(11).ADM`, `(12).ADM`, `(13).ADM`, and `(15).ADM`.

The exact uploaded file `DayZServer_PS4_x64_2026-06-06_13-02-07.ADM` was not present in this workspace at preview time.

The trimmed files preserve the parser-critical patterns without committing full raw production logs:
- killed-by-player events
- non-fatal hit lines
- repeated DEAD hit lines
- Head and Brain hit zones
- connect/disconnect lines
- PlayerList snapshots
- built, placed, repaired, dismantled, mounted, unmounted, destroyed, and folded build/action lines
- coordinate-bearing player position samples
